name: Lobster Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chopped onion in margarine until it becomes tender.
2. Add milk and melt the cream cheese into the mixture.
3. Stir occasionally until the cheese is fully melted.
4. Incorporate the remaining ingredients: sherry, cooked lobster cubes, and salt.
5. Heat the mixture until it reaches a serving temperature.
6. Serve hot.
